description: NIST CFReDS Data Leakage Case (Iaman Informant) — insider exfiltrates files over email, personal cloud, USB and CD-R while running anti-forensic cleanup. Windows 7 disk + small-media images. Ground truth derived from the NIST step-by-step answer key (ground-truth/leakage-answers.pdf).

expected_findings.note: Two SanDisk Cruzer Fit USB mass-storage devices attributed to the host via USBSTOR; serials match the NIST answer key.
Subject ran anti-forensic cleanup (file deletion / timestamp manipulation).
Exfiltration over web e-mail — surfaced by disk_scan_exfil (R27) when Gmail/webmail/attachment strings appear in evidence.
Exfiltration to personal cloud storage — disk_scan_exfil (R28) hunts Dropbox/Drive/Naver/sync-client strings.
Exfiltration to CD-R optical media — disk_scan_exfil (R29) hunts burn/optical/imapi/imgburn themes.
